query: Replace the YOLOv8 face detection with a different face detection model like MTCNN or RetinaFace, and update the cropping logic accordingly.

desired.outcome: The workflow now uses a different face detection model (e.g., MTCNN or RetinaFace) with appropriately adjusted cropping parameters to maintain correct region detection.
desired.quality: All original functionality (image loading, face detection, cropping, uncropping, preview) is preserved; the new model integrates seamlessly without dangling nodes or broken connections.

_tags.author_rationale: This candidate requires restructuring the detection stage and adapting the cropping logic, a genuine structural change that tests deep understanding of the workflow's architecture.
